short.en: A heavy, slow rat the size of a small badger, dragging a fat scarred belly.
short.cs: Těžká pomalá krysa velká jako malý jezevec, vleče za sebou tlusté zjizvené břicho.

long.en: A rat grown so big its belly drags on the floor as it shuffles. Its fur is thin and patchy, criss-crossed with old scars, and its tail is short and stubby. It is in no hurry to do anything — but those long yellow teeth could bite through a boot, and when the smaller rats scatter it does not give ground.
long.cs: Krysa tak veliká, že jí břicho dře po zemi, když se sune. Srst má řídkou a místy chybí, prokřížená starými jizvami, a ocas má krátký a tupý. Nikam nespěchá — ale ty dlouhé žluté zuby by prokously botu, a když menší krysy prchnou, ona ne.

en: {actor} lunges with surprising weight and bites {target}!
{actor} clamps its long yellow teeth onto {target}!
cs: {actor} se s překvapivou vahou vrhne a kousne {target}!
{actor} ramenem narazí do {target.gen} a tvrdě chňapne!

en: drags its belly slowly across the floor.
sniffs the air with a wheezing breath.
lets out a low, throaty squeak.
